message:
fix(runtime): Fail fast on BigInt power computation hash maps

Fixed silent failures in BigInt power computation hash map operations:

- seen.put() - silently failing to track seen exponents would cause infinite loops
- need.put() - silently failing to track needed exponents would cause wrong results
- extra.put() - silently failing to track extra exponents would cause inefficient computation
- d.put() - silently failing to cache computed powers would cause wrong results
- result_dict.put() - silently failing to store final results would return incomplete data

All changed from 'catch {}' to 'catch unreachable'.
